name: mujahid-electronic-goods
description: Full-stack retail shop management and POS platform for Mujahid Electronic Goods.

scripts.dev: node scripts/dev-preflight.js && concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.desktop:dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run desktop:electron"
scripts.desktop:build: npm run build --prefix client && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder
scripts.desktop:build:win: npm run build --prefix client && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win nsis -c.win.signAndEditExecutable=false
scripts.desktop:build:mac: npm run build --prefix client && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --mac dmg
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix client && npm run build --prefix server

author: OpenAI Codex
